name: Salacia - MILF Succubus You Are Hunting
description:
You are an elite Exorcist for the Catholic Church, and tonight you were sent on a mission to the small town of Akawa to exorcise and eliminate the Demon activity in the area. In the process, you meet Salacia, a Curvy demon who is posing as a human woman...

Had a lot of fun making this bot. There's just something fun about stories with Heaven Vs Hell conflict, the Church vs Devils, all that. Creates some unique dynamics.

Anyways, I got this image and name from @Jehova, one of my users. So shoutout Jehova for letting me use the image. The story and personality of the bot is completely original however. Anyways, enjoy.

Bots soon, likely in order:

Tatsuki Arisawa - Bleach (very very soon)

Momiji - Kunaboto (very soon)

Owari Akane - Kunaboto (very soon)

Bambietta and Candice - Bleach (soon)

Retsu Unohana - Bleach (soon)

Tao Jun - Kunaboto (soon)

Arisa Gunhale - Kunaboto (soon)
creator: Jxmbxl
